_note: Mona Lisa Underdrive item catalog. type: hardware = matrix interface (enables Jack In), software = warez, skill = chipped skill, misc/key = story items (key items can't be sold).

colin_unit.name: Maas-Neotek unit (Colin)
colin_unit.desc: A slab of biosoft that projects a ghost only you can see: Colin, guide to London and increasingly to everything else. Your father's parting gift.

shuriken.name: Shuriken
shuriken.desc: A steel star from a Portobello stall, bought for you by Sally Shears. 'Souvenir,' she said. It means she thinks you'll need luck.

cortex_lace.name: Cortical lace
cortex_lace.desc: Your father's wire, grown through your head since childhood. You are the deck. You always were.

simstim_deck.name: Simstim deck
simstim_deck.desc: Consumer stim rig, one warm slot, one dream at a time. Yours plays Angie Mitchell on repeat.

wiz_stash.name: Wiz
wiz_stash.desc: Cleveland pharmaceuticals, retail grade. Makes the edges bright and the hours short. Lanette said never on an empty stomach.

cutting_torch.name: Cutting torch
cutting_torch.desc: Factory-standard plasma cutter. Builds Judges, opens hovers, settles arguments.

factory_trodes.name: Factory trode set
factory_trodes.desc: Gentry's spare trodes, patched into the Count's tap. A borrowed window on a stolen universe.

judge_remote.name: Judge remote
judge_remote.desc: Deadman trigger for the Judge: two meters of blades and verdicts, wired to answer only you.

tick_rig_pass.name: Tick's guest line
tick_rig_pass.desc: A jack on Tick's rig in Brixton, opened for you against every instinct the little man has.

monitor_kit.name: Cherry's monitor kit
monitor_kit.desc: Med-tech telemetry scavenged into a shoebox: the Count's pulse, pressure, and dreams, in amber numbers.

hotel_key.name: New Suzuki Envoy key
hotel_key.desc: Chipped key to a suite registered to a name that photographs like somebody else's.

angie_stim.name: Angie Mitchell stim cassette
angie_stim.desc: Top of the charts, every week, forever. Her life, warm-slotted. Better than yours by design.

makeup_kit.name: Pro makeup kit
makeup_kit.desc: Stage-grade paint. Can make anyone into almost anyone, which turns out to be a growth industry.

security_badge.name: Sense/Net crew badge
security_badge.desc: Laminated access, PRODUCTION — ALL AREAS. In the right lobby, worth more than a gun.

skill_streetdeal.name: Street Deal skillsoft
skill_streetdeal.desc: Chipped hustle: reading buyers, pricing trouble, spotting the exit.

skill_icebreaking.name: ICE Breaking skillsoft
skill_icebreaking.desc: Chipped intrusion technique, for heads that didn't grow their own.

gentry_soft.name: Gentry's probe suite
gentry_soft.desc: Hand-rolled matrix probes, tuned for reading Shapes. Gentry would want it back.

loa_veve.name: Drawn vévé
loa_veve.desc: Mamman Brigitte's sign, copied from a dream onto hotel stationery. The ink shouldn't matter. It matters.

thermos.name: Thermos of real coffee
thermos.desc: Factory currency. Worth more than money on Dog Solitude; almost worth the walk to Marvin's.

flechette_pistol.name: Flechette pistol
flechette_pistol.desc: Quiet, fast, and absolutely against the terms of everyone's parole.
